---
title: 'Start Here'
date: '2016-06-04T23:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tÅÂ·dÃ¤'''
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '265396957067299139'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tÅÂ·dÃ¤_/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20131108-150118-e0a38de8dac5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="298" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20131108-150118-d25fd46441ea.jpg" width="400" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.meyersound.com/about/people/buford_jones/" target="_blank">Audio Seminar with Buford Jones</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
Since 1995, I have run Audio as a "sound guy" volunteer for churches and theaters, played guitar, drums, bass, and a little piano, sang. I've been on the worship team, and I've been the worship leader.<br />
<br />
<br />
In short... I'm a Musician and Audio geek.<br />
<br />
<br />
This blog is just a journal of sorts, for me to stock pile and store ideas, articles, thoughts, studies, and knowledge in the area of Sound, Music, and Audio.<br />
<br />
<br />
Enjoy!<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/whoami-e34675a28374.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/whoami-e35b6adbb71a.jpg" width="153" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
Darrell<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
